Video.summary: A man gets a silly string surprise; plus previous winners return to compete for - the $100,000 grand prize.
Video.title: Episode 608

Video.summary: Halloween videos; a rodeo bull - tosses a man in the air; and Dad kicks a soccer ball - into his own face.
Video.title: Episode 609

Video.summary: A gymnast gets tossed and dropped; and a Thanksgiving turkey - gets thrown out a window.
Video.title: Episode 610

Video.summary: Clips include a singing cat, a spaghetti-snarfing kid, a wild pińata party, and a sassy wedding minister.
Video.title: Episode 1411

Video.summary: All-Animal Extravaganza with talking cats, dogs vs. cats, and a montage of swooping birds.
Video.title: Episode 1412

Video.summary: Messy kids, clever animal escapes, rude awakenings, and touching wedding proposals.
